script: sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure /home/axel/.azure; sudo chown -R axel:axel /home/axel/.azure; sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure /home/jose/.azure; sudo chown -R jose:jose /home/jose/.azure; sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure /home/lia/.azure; sudo chown -R lia:lia /home/lia/.azure; sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure /home/afrah/.azure; sudo chown -R afrah:afrah /home/afrah/.azure; echo done copy; sudo -u axel az account show --query name -o tsv 2>&1 | head -2; sudo systemctl restart axel-responder.service jose-responder.service lia-responder.service afrah-responder.service; sleep 3; systemctl is-active axel-responder.service jose-responder.service lia-responder.service afrah-responder.service
